name: schema-registry-dag-schema-deprecation-manager
description: T200 SchemaDeprecationManager — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Marks schema DEPRECATED, notifies dependents, emits SchemaDeprecated. DNA-8: store before emit.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: marks DEPRECATED status, loads dependent schemas, notifies all dependents, DNA-8 store before SchemaDeprecated emit
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern + deprecation-flow + dependent-notification + audit-before-emit patterns for T200

Break T200 into: consume SchemaDeprecationRequested → load schema record → update status to DEPRECATED → load dependent schemas from DAG → notify each dependent → storeDocument(auditRecord) → emit SchemaDeprecated

Generate schema-deprecation-manager.service.ts — triggered by SchemaDeprecationRequested event, updates schema status to DEPRECATED in DATABASE, queries DAG adjacency for all dependent schemas, sends deprecation notification to each dependent, DNA-8: storeDocument(deprecationAudit) BEFORE emitting SchemaDeprecated. NEVER emits before dependent notification.
Named check validation: status_updated_to_deprecated, dependents_loaded_from_dag, all_dependents_notified, audit_stored_before_schema_deprecated_emit, never_emit_before_notify
Score generated code 0-100 against T200 iron rules: DEPRECATED status update, dependent notification, DNA-8 audit-before-emit, complete orchestration
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=deprecated-status+dependent-notify+audit-before-emit, rejected=emit-before-notify OR skip-dependent-notification OR no-audit-record. curriculumTier=1.
